name: @voyant-travel/workflows-selfhost-node-server
description: Reference Node/Docker self-host server for Voyant Workflows.

scripts.build:deps: pnpm -C ../.. --filter @voyant-travel/workflows build && pnpm -C ../.. --filter @voyant-travel/workflows-orchestrator build && pnpm -C ../.. --filter @voyant-travel/workflows-orchestrator-node build
scripts.bundle:example: pnpm -C ../.. --filter @voyant-travel/cli build && node ../../packages/cli/bin/voyant.mjs workflows build --file ./examples/basic-workflows.ts --out ./dist --platform node
